sources.title: Khoobsurat 1999 Dv DRip X 264 AAC 5.1 Chapters Esub

metadata.Plot: Khoobsurat is a quirky, modern romantic comedy about what happens when a vibrant, hopelessly romantic physiotherapist meets a handsome young Rajput prince who is her complete opposite--and engaged to someone else. It is a battle of values between two individually-crazy families, one that encourages discipline and self-restraint versus the other, which is all for spontaneity and open-mindedness. Khoobsurat looks at universal themes: being able to love and respect yourself; and having to fight for the things you really want.
metadata.Writer: D.N. Mukherjee, Indira Bisht, Juhi Chaturvedi
metadata.Actors: Sonam Kapoor, Fawad Khan, Ratna Pathak Shah
